features: Colourful Bubbles: The bubble gun is equipped with LED lights, the fascinating light effects add extra colour to the bubbles. Whether it's during the day or under the cover of night, this bubble machine consistently offers kids a delightful experience

Rechargeable Battery: The Bubble Machine is able to charge the battery by using a Type-C charging cable, so say goodbye to the frequent battery replacement mode. By simplifying the charging process, it ensures that the bubble gun is always ready for play

Appropriate Size: Thanks to its portable size, kids can easily take the bubble gun outdoors for all kinds of fun parties. The handle is designed for little hands to grip easily, just pull the trigger and watch a flurry of delightful bubbles appear

360° Leak-Proof: The bubble gun features a separate solution compartment, ensuring that the bubble solution remains contained. Children can also hold the bubble gun to make bubbles during the running process, enjoy bubble fun under leak-proof conditions

Ideal Gifts: This bubble gun effortlessly immerses kids in joy with its vibrant bubbles, sparking their imagination and fostering creativity. Whether as a present or a birthday treat for kids aged 3-8, it promises unforgettable moments of playful delight
